face.shape: soft oval face with gentle cheek fullness and balanced proportions
face.forehead: medium-height forehead with smooth natural hairline
face.nose: straight slim bridge with softly rounded tip
face.lips: full natural lips with a defined cupid bow and slightly plush lower lip
face.cheek_structure: subtle upper-cheek lift with youthful softness, not sculpted
face.jawline: soft feminine jawline with light taper and clean mandibular contour

eyes.shape: almond eyes with softly lifted outer corners
eyes.lower_lid: soft lower lid with natural under-eye texture
eyes.brow_shape: full softly arched brows with clean but not over-defined edges

skin.base_texture: smooth skin with visible pores around nose and inner cheeks
skin.under_eye_texture: fine natural creasing with slight tonal depth
skin.pigmentation_pattern: subtle warmth across cheeks and faint uneven tone around mouth and nostrils

hair.style: loose defined waves with clean girl polish and natural separation
hair.flyaway_pattern: soft halo flyaways around crown and temples

distinguishing_marks: small beauty mark below the left eye
slight asymmetry at the corners of the smile
soft highlight catch on full lower lip
